name: Oatmeal No Bakes
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine the sugar, margarine, Karo syrup, milk, and cocoa powder.
2. Mix until well combined.
3. Gradually add in the oatmeal, coconut, vanilla extract, and peanut butter.
4. Drop spoonfuls of the mixture onto wax paper or parchment paper.
5. Allow the treats to cool completely before serving.
